DESCRIPTION.<GROUP>: A named config group. Each group is a runnable configuration profile.
DESCRIPTION.<GROUP>.download_loc: Directory where downloaded HTML pages will be saved.
DESCRIPTION.<GROUP>.html_dir: Directory containing HTML pages to extract fields from (often the same as download_loc).
DESCRIPTION.<GROUP>.items_out_dir: Directory where extracted items are saved as JSON files.
DESCRIPTION.<GROUP>.text_out_dir: Directory where generated text outputs are saved.
DESCRIPTION.<GROUP>.prompt_template_path: Path to the base prompt template file used to generate per-item prompts.
DESCRIPTION.<GROUP>.prompts_out_dir: Directory where per-item prompt text files are written.
DESCRIPTION.<GROUP>.prompt_injection_keys: List of extracted item keys to inject into the prompt template.
DESCRIPTION.<GROUP>.basename_keys: Item keys used to build output filenames.
DESCRIPTION.<GROUP>.extract_rules: Rules describing how to extract fields from HTML (CSS selectors, optional separators, and optional regex extraction).
DESCRIPTION.<GROUP>.extract_rules.<field>.css: CSS selector used to extract a field from the HTML page.
DESCRIPTION.<GROUP>.extract_rules.<field>.attr: Optional attribute name to read from the matched node instead of text content.
DESCRIPTION.<GROUP>.extract_rules.<field>.sep: Optional separator used when joining extracted text content (commonly '\n').
DESCRIPTION.<GROUP>.extract_rules.<field>.regex: Regex pattern applied to the raw HTML to extract a field. If present, it takes precedence over 'css'. The first capture group is used as the extracted value.
DESCRIPTION.<GROUP>.download_urls: List of listing/search URLs to scrape links from.
DESCRIPTION.<GROUP>.link_selector: CSS selector used to find target page links on a listing/search page.
DESCRIPTION.<GROUP>.links_per_search: Maximum number of links to collect per listing/search URL.
DESCRIPTION.<GROUP>.filename_from_url_regex: Regex used to derive a stable filename from a downloaded page URL (optional but recommended).
DESCRIPTION.<GROUP>.title_selectors: Fallback CSS selectors used to locate a page title within a downloaded HTML page.
